---
title: "Week 04"
---

::: {style="color: #6284a2"}
### Monday (03/02)
:::

**Topics**

-   Fisher Information

**Daily assignment**

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_09.pdf) (very short!)

**Class activity**

-   None

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #6284a2"}
### Wednesday (03/04)
:::

**Topics**

-   MLE asymptotics
-   Cramer-Rao Lower Bound

**Daily assignment**

-   None!

**Class activity**

-   Asymptotic dist of MLE [visualization](class/fisher_viz.qmd)
-   [CRLB practice problems](class/11_CRLB.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #6284a2"}
### Friday (03/06)
:::

**Topics**

-   CRLB cont.
-   Efficiency

**Daily assignment**

-   None!

**Class activity**

-   Efficiency [visualization](class/efficiency_viz.qmd)
